name: Better Than Sex Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix flour, sugar, and butter until smooth and creamy.
2. Pour the mixture into a 9 x 13 inch pie pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees F for about 10 minutes or until browned.
4. Allow to cool completely.
5. Spread Coolwhip evenly over the cooled crust.
6. In another bowl, soften cream cheese and mix with pudding and milk until well combined.
7. Let the mixture cool until thoroughly chilled.
8. Top with additional Coolwhip and sprinkle chopped nuts on top.
